arts.ttl: Diogo Jota told he would be 'best in the world' if Liverpool star retired from football
arts.sum: Diogo Jota is renowned for his EA FC ability despite being a professional footballer at Liverpool

arts.ttl: Why aren't Liverpool, Arsenal and Man Utd playing at the FIFA Club World Cup 2025?
arts.sum: Ahead of the draw for the FIFA Club World Cup 2025, we look at why the likes of Arsenal, Manchester United and Liverpool will not be involved in the competition, which the US host next summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes referee admission and says Liverpool 'didn't cross the line'
arts.sum: Arne Slot refuses to criticise referee Andy Madley after Liverpool see three penalty shouts turned down in their 3-3 draw with Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Arne Slot doubles down on Liverpool goalkeeper stance with Caoimhin Kelleher decision looming
arts.sum: Arne Slot will soon have to decide whether Alisson Becker or Caoimhin Kelleher plays for Liverpool in the Premier League and Champions League

arts.ttl: Newcastle peg back Liverpool after Salah brace
arts.sum: Premier League leaders Liverpool had their advantage cut to seven points as Fabian Schar's late equaliser earned Newcastle United a thrilling 3-3 draw at St James' Park on Wednesday.

arts.ttl: Liverpool make Virgil van Dijk 'contract offer' as 'fresh update emerges' on Mohamed Salah situation
arts.sum: Liverpool reportedly make a contract offer to captain Virgil van Dijk as a new update emerges over Mohamed Salah's situation.

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher goes wild after Mohamed Salah goal as Liverpool legend makes contract demand
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher had a new contract message for Mohamed Salah and Liverpool following the attacker's performance against Newcastle United

arts.ttl: Newcastle fans love how Anthony Gordon celebrated after scoring against his boyhood club Liverpool just months after being linked with a move back to Merseyside
arts.sum: Gordon found the net in the 62nd minute at St James' Park with a low finish from nine yards after beating Reds defender Joe Gomez with a sharp turn. That goal put Newcastle 2-1 up.

arts.ttl: Howe 'gutted' Newcastle did not win 'great game'
arts.sum: Newcastle boss Eddie Howe says he is "gutted" not to win a "great game" as his side let slip their early lead against Liverpool, before snatching a late equaliser at St James' Park.

arts.ttl: 'Best game of season' - Newcastle give Liverpool rivals hope
arts.sum: Liverpool's 3-3 draw at Newcastle is described as "one of the best games of the season" - and gives their rivals hope in the battle for the Premier League title.
